subject: HLTH
course_description: What constitutes a nutritious diet? How do we know? Lectures and activities will explore daily needs, sources, functions, and metabolism of nutrients and other dietary components. Learners will apply evidence-based dietary recommendations through personal nutrition assessment and scenario analysis.
course_notes: BIOL 141 or BIOL_OX 141 or CHEM 141 or CHEM_OX 141 or CHEM 150 or CHEM_OX 150 or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
requisites: BIOL 141 or BIOL_OX 141 or CHEM 141 or CHEM_OX 141 or CHEM 150 or CHEM_OX 150 or equivalent transfer credit as prerequisite.
